accommodations.text: Give advance warning before transitions and changes in routine.
accommodations.source_quote: advance warning before transitions and changes in routine

accommodations.text: Provide a checklist to break long assignments into steps.
accommodations.source_quote: checklist to break long assignments into steps

accommodations.text: Break multi-step directions into chunked, numbered steps.
accommodations.source_quote: break multi-step directions into numbered steps

accommodations.text: Accept typed responses in place of extended handwriting.
accommodations.source_quote: accept typed responses in place of extended handwriting

accommodations.text: Allow text-to-speech for grade-level reading passages.
Do not require unplanned oral responses in front of the class.
accommodations.source_quote: no unplanned oral responses in front of the class

accommodations.text: Give a two-minute warning before transitions.
Provide captions or a transcript for all audio and video media.
accommodations.source_quote: captions or a transcript for all audio and video media

services.provider_role: Teacher of the deaf and hard of hearing

goals.text: Priya will follow two-step spoken directions in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Follows two-step directions in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: follow two-step spoken directions in 4 of 5 opportunities

goals.text: Given a grade-level text, Aanya will identify the main idea and two supporting details with 80% accuracy.
goals.baseline: Identifies the main idea with 40% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: identify the main idea and two supporting details with 80% accuracy

goals.text: Layla will independently report FM system problems to the teacher in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Reports FM system problems with prompting in 1 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: independently report FM system problems in 4 of 5 opportunities

goals.text: Priya will use correct past-tense verbs in structured sentences with 80% accuracy.
goals.baseline: Uses correct past-tense verbs with 50% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: use correct past-tense verbs with 80% accuracy
